title: Martin Možina
text: Home * People * Martin Možina Martin Možina , a Slovenian computer scientist and researcher at the Artificial Intelligence Laboratory [1] , University of Ljubljana . His research interests include argumentation based machine learning , which combines machine learning from examples with concepts from the field of argumentation , and automated explanation and tutoring systems.
